purpose: Publish the current package.json version to npm using NPM_TOKEN. No agent.

dry-run.description: Print the publish plan without requiring NPM_TOKEN or publishing.

tag.description: npm dist-tag to publish under. Defaults to latest.

access.description: npm package access. Defaults to public.

issue.description: Issue/PR number to post terminal notice on.

success: npm-publish completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: npm-publish cannot return a valid canonical result
